summary: Bug fix iteration 11 testing complete. The 't.map is not a function' bug has been FIXED. All pages load without console errors. All API endpoints return correct data types (arrays/objects). All .map() calls are properly protected with Array.isArray guards.

issues: Hero image not loading - settings.hero_image points to different domain (tourism-cluster-mx.preview.emergentagent.com) which may be inaccessible. Code correctly falls back to DEFAULT_HERO_IMAGE but that image also shows alt text. This is a data/configuration issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Home page loads without 't.map is not a function' error
Home page renders: hero section, stats section, categories (4 cards), featured empresas (2 cards), CTA section, footer
/empresas page loads with 3 empresa cards - no console errors
/prensa page loads with 3 articulos - no console errors
/mapa page loads with map and 2 empresa markers - no console errors
/nosotros page loads with contact form - no console errors
/empresas/ecomuk-aventura-natural detail page loads with activities, gallery carousel, social links - no console errors
/admin login with admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard with 4 analytics charts
Backend: GET /api/categorias returns object with categorias array
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: Home.jsx removed unnecessary POST /api/seed call
Bug fix verified: Home.jsx uses Promise.allSettled for parallel data loading
Bug fix verified: All pages (Home, Empresas, Prensa, Mapa, EmpresaDetalle) have Array.isArray guards on .map() calls
Bug fix verified: EmpresaDetalle.jsx uses optional chaining on actividades, galeria, social_links
All API endpoints return correct data types - arrays for lists, objects for single items
No console errors on any page during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 't.map is not a function' verified complete. All .map() calls are protected with Array.isArray guards. All pages load without console errors. SMTP email is MOCKED (configured but skips due to missing credentials).

mocked_apis.SMTP_email: Configured but not functional - silently skips due to missing SMTP credentials in .env

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: t.map is not a function error on Home.jsx
root_causes_fixed: 1. Home.jsx called POST /seed before fetching data (unnecessary, removed)
2. All response.data were set without Array.isArray validation (fixed with guards)
3. Some property accesses like empresa.actividades.map() lacked optional chaining (fixed)
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: FIXED - No console errors on any page
